content.query:
-- Create master key to encrypt credentials
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = '<set locally, not stored in repo>';



-- Allow Synapse to access africapulse storage
CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL [africapulse_credential]
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE africapulse_gold
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://africapulse.dfs.core.windows.net/africa-economic-pulse',
    CREDENTIAL = [africapulse_credential]
);


CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
);



CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.economic_summary
(
    country_iso3        VARCHAR(10),
    country_name        VARCHAR(100),
    year                INT,
    gdp_usd             FLOAT,
    inflation_pct       FLOAT,
    unemployment_pct    FLOAT,
    gdp_billions        FLOAT,
    data_quality_flag   VARCHAR(50),
    ingestion_date      DATE,
    pipeline_name       VARCHAR(100),
    source_system       VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = '/gold/economic_summary/**',
    DATA_SOURCE = africapulse_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
);

SELECT TOP 5 * FROM dbo.economic_summary ORDER BY year DESC;





CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.nigeria_spotlight
(
    country_iso3        VARCHAR(10),
    country_name        VARCHAR(100),
    year                INT,
    gdp_usd             FLOAT,
    inflation_pct       FLOAT,
    unemployment_pct    FLOAT,
    gdp_billions        FLOAT,
    data_quality_flag   VARCHAR(50),
    gdp_prev_year       FLOAT,
    gdp_growth_pct      FLOAT,
    ingestion_date      DATE,
    pipeline_name       VARCHAR(100),
    source_system       VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = '/gold/nigeria_spotlight/**',
    DATA_SOURCE = africapulse_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
);

SELECT TOP 5 * FROM dbo.nigeria_spotlight ORDER BY year DESC;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.country_comparisons
(
    country_iso3            VARCHAR(10),
    country_name            VARCHAR(100),
    avg_gdp_billions        FLOAT,
    avg_inflation_pct       FLOAT,
    avg_unemployment_pct    FLOAT,
    ingestion_date          DATE,
    pipeline_name           VARCHAR(100),
    source_system           VARCHAR(100)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = '/gold/country_comparisons/**',
    DATA_SOURCE = africapulse_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
);

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM dbo.country_comparisons ORDER BY avg_gdp_billions DESC;




-- View 1: Top 10 African economies by average GDP
CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_top10_economies AS
SELECT TOP 10
    country_name,
    country_iso3,
    avg_gdp_billions,
    avg_inflation_pct,
    avg_unemployment_pct
FROM dbo.country_comparisons
ORDER BY avg_gdp_billions DESC;

-- View 2: Nigeria economic trend over time
CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_nigeria_trend AS
SELECT
    year,
    gdp_billions,
    gdp_growth_pct,
    inflation_pct,
    unemployment_pct
FROM dbo.nigeria_spotlight
WHERE year >= 2010;

-- View 3: Latest year snapshot for all countries
CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_latest_snapshot AS
SELECT
    country_name,
    country_iso3,
    year,
    gdp_billions,
    inflation_pct,
    unemployment_pct,
    data_quality_flag
FROM dbo.economic_summary
WHERE year = (SELECT MAX(year) FROM dbo.economic_summary)
AND data_quality_flag = 'complete';

-- View 4: Full economic summary for trend analysis
CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_economic_trends AS
SELECT
    country_name,
    country_iso3,
    year,
    gdp_billions,
    inflation_pct,
    unemployment_pct,
    data_quality_flag
FROM dbo.economic_summary
WHERE data_quality_flag = 'complete'
AND year >= 2000;

SELECT TOP 5 * FROM dbo.vw_top10_economies;
SELECT TOP 5 * FROM dbo.vw_nigeria_trend;
SELECT * FROM dbo.vw_latest_snapshot;
SELECT * FROM dbo.vw_economic_trends;




-- Drop and recreate vw_economic_trends without the complete filter
DROP VIEW dbo.vw_economic_trends;

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_economic_trends AS
SELECT
    country_name,
    country_iso3,
    year,
    gdp_billions,
    inflation_pct,
    unemployment_pct,
    data_quality_flag
FROM dbo.economic_summary
WHERE year >= 2000
AND gdp_billions IS NOT NULL;




DROP VIEW dbo.vw_latest_snapshot;

CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_latest_snapshot AS
SELECT
    country_name,
    country_iso3,
    year,
    gdp_billions,
    inflation_pct,
    unemployment_pct,
    data_quality_flag
FROM dbo.economic_summary
WHERE year = (SELECT MAX(year) FROM dbo.economic_summary)
AND gdp_billions IS NOT NULL;
